extName.description: Extension name shown in the Chrome toolbar and extensions page.

extDescription.message: Schedule and publish social media posts across Facebook, Instagram, X, LinkedIn, and Pinterest from any webpage.
extDescription.description: Short description shown under the extension name on chrome://extensions and the Web Store listing.

actionTitle.description: Tooltip shown when hovering the toolbar icon.

commandOpenPopup.description: Description of the keyboard shortcut to open the popup.

commandQuickSchedule.message: Quick-schedule current page as a post
commandQuickSchedule.description: Description of the keyboard shortcut to schedule the active tab.

ctxSchedulePage.description: Right-click menu item for the whole page.

ctxScheduleSelection.description: Right-click menu item for selected text.

loginTitle.description: Brand title shown on the login screen.

loginSecurityNote.message: 🔒 The extension only supports login. Registration is on the website.
